The sentence "Mark Stone spent time in the penalty box in the Stanley Cup" is plausible. 

In the National Hockey League (NHL), players can be sent to the penalty box for various infractions. The Stanley Cup is the championship trophy awarded to the NHL playoff champion. Therefore, it is possible for a player like Mark Stone to spend time in the penalty box during the Stanley Cup playoffs.
